creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to yuri from comment #27)

I'm going to test these new patches shortly, but looking at them I noticed one thing which slipped by me with the previous set.

Why are you removing the #include <openssl/rand.h> line from torrent.cpp?

Is that really needed? It should work fine as is IMHO.

Thanks.
